Ul'dah.desc:
You are in the bustling City of Ul'dah. You see an Aetheryte Crystal in front of you.
In the distance, you see someone getting mugged while another just dances there. You try to ignore it...

Gridania.desc:
You are in the Forest Town of Gridania. You see an Aetheryte Crystal in front of you.
In the distance, you see some Miqo'te band performing. You don't recognize any of these strange songs...

Limsa Lominsa.desc:
You are in the Port City of Limsa Lominsa. You see an Aetheryte Crystal in front of you.
In the distance, you see scantily clad groups of people gather together. Wonder what they are talking about...

Thanalan.desc: You are in the desert of Thanalan. You feel like your skin is melting from the heat. How could anyone live here...

La Noscea.desc: You are in the plains of La Noscea. You can feel the nice breeze from the ocean enveloping you. You somehow feel very relaxed...too relaxed...

The Black Shroud.desc: You are in the dense forest of The Black Shroud. You feel so small compared to the towering trees that surrounds you. You feel like someone is watching you...

Coerthas.desc: You are in the snowy mountains of Coerthas. You feel so cold surrounded by all this snow. You feel your extremities slowly developing frostbites...

Mor Dhona.desc: You are in the barren wasteland of Mor Dhona. You feel uneasy surrounded by the vestiges of a deadly battle. You feel like a curse is surrounds this place...
